title: CI gates: schema + license + provenance + dead-link checks
context: Quality is enforced by CI: every record must be schema-valid, license-cleared, fully provenance-stamped, and free of dead links before release (PLAN section 8, O2/O7). Depends on the provenance validator (003). Binding cancer guardrails (PLAN section 7): open-access/aggregate/de-identified metadata only; no controlled-access (dbGaP/EGA) or patient-identifiable data; COSMIC/OncoKB reference-only (not ingested); provenance on every assertion; links only, no omics/sequence/image payloads re-hosted; no medical advice. No partner/requestor secured yet, so verifiedNeed is false.
objective: Add CI gates that fail the build on schema-invalid, unlicensed, unprovenanced, or dead-link records.
acceptanceCriteria: CI runs schema validation, license-clearance check, provenance completeness check, and dead-link check on every PR.
A schema-invalid, unlicensed, unsourced, or dead-link record fails CI; checks are reused from the provenance validator and license register.
CI report surfaces O2 (100% provenance/license) and O7 (<5% dead links) metrics; reviewed by maintainer.
output: A merged PR adding CI workflows for schema, license, provenance, and dead-link gates.
